meta.title: Kwa mondo omiyi chenro mar konyo ji obed gi nyalo mar ng'eyo Muma

hero.title: Kwa mondo omiyi chenro mar konyo ji obed gi nyalo mar ng'eyo Muma
hero.lead: IATF nono kwayo mag chenro mag konyo ji ng'e dhok ma giwinjo ma wuok kuom joma dwaro ng'eyo dhokno gadier.
support: Ok ochuno ni nyaka ing'e weche duto motudore gi tuwono, to gima dwarore en mana ng'eyo ni en chandruok mane, ng'ano ma chandore, kod gimomiyo chandruogno nitie.

intro: Yorego duto itiyogo e yo machalre.

items.label: Websait mar websaitno
items.body: Ti gi fom man piny kae e chiwo kwayo moriere.

items.label: E-mail marwa
items.body: Or kwayo mari achiel kachiel ne {{contact.requestsEmail}}Penjo mag e-mail nyalo bedo rekod mag kwayo mag ji bang' nono kendo pwodhogi.

items.label: Ywaruok
items.body: Chak kanyo kapo ni mano yot. kwayo dhi nyime e nonro achielno.

guidance.title: Kapok ioro kwayo moro amora
paragraphs: IATF tiyo e lela. Kwayo inyalo choki kendo goye kaka rekod mag kwayo e lela e riwruok mar GitHub, e websaitni, kata giduto.
Kik inyis kuonde ma ng'ato odakie, nambni mag simu, weche thieth, kata weche ma nyalo fwenyogo ng'at ma tiyo gi teknoloji makonyo, mak mana kapo ni mano dwarore kendo iyie mondo IATF onon wechego.
IATF golo weche ma ok ochuno mag tudruok gi ji kapok gigoyo rekod mag kwayo.

review.title: Nono gik ma igeno
paragraphs: Chiwo kwayo moro ok nyis ni koro ibiro yie gi kwayono.
IATF nono kwayo ma ng'ato ogolo mondo ong'e ni en tich mowinjore gi tijno, ni en gima nyalore, ni otime e yo maber, kod kabe tijno owinjore oket e kar kano weche ma ji duto nyalo ng'eyo.
Nitie kwayo moko ma inyalo tam, inyalo ket nyime, kata inyalo lokgi kapok orwakgi.

fields.name: yo mar tudruok
fields.label: Yo ma ji nyalo tudorego
fields.helper: Onego otim nonro e yo mane?

fields.name: Weche Minyalo Tiyogo e Tudruok gi Jomoko
fields.label: Weche mag tudruok
fields.helper: E-mail address kata Discord handle mar luwo.
fields.placeholder: E-mail adres kata ng'at ma iluongo ni Discord

fields.name: dhok
fields.label: Dhok ma ji wacho
fields.helper: Dhok mihero, kapo ni mano dwarore.

fields.name: chandruok
fields.label: En chandruok mane ma in iwuon idwaro tieko?
fields.helper: Ler ane wachno e yo mayot.

fields.name: weche mamoko
fields.label: Weche mamoko
fields.helper: Nyis gimachielo manyalo konyo e lero gimomiyo dwarore: gimomiyo dwarore, ranyisi, weche mwanyalo tiyogo, paro ma ok kare e wi program moro, kata gik madwarore ni otim mapiyo.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Be iyie gi chenro mar timo nonro ma ji duto nyalo tiyogo?
fields.helper: Chenro moyiego en mar kano weche duto e bwo IATF.

items: kar kano weche e riwruok mar IATF GitHub
injinia ma ne omi migawo mar timo tijno
layisensi mar copyleft mar kod kod gik ma itiyogo e tijno
dongruok mar oganda e kar kano weche

header.title: Kwayo moro machuok kendo malong'o oromo mondo omi ichak

paragraphs: Kapo ni in gi dwaro mar konyo ji obed gi lony kuom weche thieth, kendo iparo ni mano onego obed chenro mar oganda duto, inyalo oronwa wachno.
